articles.title: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
articles.description: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.

articles.title: Chris Mason: Burnham begins to sketch out vision but faces huge and imminent questions
articles.description: The new MP for Makerfield will give what his team has called "his first major leadership speech" on Monday morning.

articles.title: England captain Ben Stokes says retiring from international cricket 'best thing' for him
articles.description: Ben Stokes describes the reasons for his international retirement as he says he became 'burned out' in the build-up to the summer.

articles.title: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
articles.description: The pilot and 10 passengers - including five first-time parachutists - died in the incident, local officials said.
